name: Patient 18
history: Academic underperformance despite intelligence. Attended college, felt isolated and dropped out. Two years of credits remain. Mother has high expectations. Financial difficulties.
intermediate_belief: I'll never finish my degree and will disappoint everyone.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm a permanent failure compared to my sister.
coping_strategies: Procrastination, comparison to sibling, scheduling attempts.
situation: Experienced unproductive week due to scheduling problems. Comparing self to sister's achievements.
auto_thought: My sister manages her life perfectly while I can't even schedule a productive week.
behavior: Have unproductive week while comparing self to sister.
